sections.name: Verse 1
sections.annotation: Vocal pick up, guitar starts on beat 1

lines.chords: Gaug | F# | G#madd9 | E | F#7 | F#7
lines.lyrics: Oh the last time I saw Paul I was horrible and almost let him in

lines.chords: Gaug | F# | G#madd9 | E | F#7 | B
lines.lyrics: But my I stopped and caught the wall and my mouth got dry so all I did was take him for a spin

lines.chords: B | D#7 | G#madd9 | E | F#7 | F#7
lines.lyrics: Yeah we hopped inside my car and I drove in circles 'round the feight train yard

lines.chords: Gaug | F# | G#madd9 | E | F#7 | B
lines.lyrics: He turned the headlights off, then he pulled the bottle out then he showed me what was love
I'll be the morning bright goodnight shadow machine
I'll be the record player baby if you know that I mean
I'll be the real tough cookie with the whiskey breath
I'll be the killer and a thriller and the cause of our death

lines.chords: Gaug | F# | G#madd9 | E | F#7 | F#7
lines.lyrics: In the blossom of the months.  I was sure that I'd get driven off with thought.

lines.chords: Gaug | F# | G#madd9 | E | F#7 | B | B
lines.lyrics: So I swallowed all of it as I realized there was no one who could kiss away my shit.
I'll be the morning bright goodnight shadow machine
I'll be the record player baby if you know that I mean
I'll be the real tough cookie with the whiskey breath
I'll be the killer and a thriller and the cause of our death

lines.chords: Gaug | F# | G#madd9 | E | F#7 | F#7 | B | F# | G#madd9 | E | F#7
Gaug | F# | G#madd9 | E | F#7 | F#7
lines.lyrics: Paul, I know you said that you'd take me anyway I cam or went

lines.chords: Gaug | F# | G#madd9 | E | F#7 | F#7 | B
lines.lyrics: But I'll push you from my brain.  See, you're gentle baby.  I couldn't stay, I'd only bring you pain
I'll be your starry-eyed lover and the one that you saw
I was your hurricane rider and the woman you'd call
We were just two moonshiners on the cusp of a breath
And I've been burning for you baby since the minute I left
